description: Readiness criteria for the Cici Seed Phase. A seed is complete when all required criteria are met.

criteria.name: seed_intent_filled
criteria.description: users/cici/seed_intent.json exists, all placeholder values replaced, _instructions field removed.

criteria.name: instance_id_consistent
criteria.description: seed_intent.json instance_id matches the directory name ('cici').

criteria.name: identity_surface_initialized
criteria.description: users/cici/governed-state/identity/instance.json exists and is valid JSON with required fields.

criteria.name: surface_map_present
criteria.description: users/cici/governed-state/surface-map.json exists and lists all known surfaces.

criteria.name: committed_to_git
criteria.description: All seed artifacts committed to the main branch with a 'seed:' commit message.

criteria.name: runtime_connected
criteria.description: Supabase runtime is deployed and reachable. MCP server responds to a health check.

criteria.name: at_least_one_mcp_client_connected
criteria.description: At least one MCP client (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) is configured and can reach the MCP endpoint.

criteria.name: capture_tested
criteria.description: At least one MCP capture has been successfully performed and is visible in Supabase.
criteria.note: Strongly recommended before considering the instance production-ready.

confidence_model.description: Confidence in seed readiness is scored 0.0–1.0 based on criteria met.
